files.content:
---
color: blue
description: Reviews code with project guidance.
enabled: true
mcpServers:
  - local-fs
mode: subagent
model: gpt-5.5
name: Reviewer
temperature: 0.2
tools: {"bash":true,"read":true}
---
Review code. Read .opencode/agents/reviewer/references/guide.md first.

---
agent: reviewer
arguments:
  - {"description":"Release target.","name":"target","required":true}
description: Prepare release notes.
model: gpt-5.5
name: Ship
---
Ship {{target}} safely.

---
description: Test-first workflow.
name: TDD
---
Write failing tests before code. See .opencode/skills/tdd/references/example.md.
